name: Aspen Surgery Center
services: orthopedic, dental, otolaryngologic, endoscopic, OB/GYN, ophthalmologic, pain, foot, plastic, general surgery

name: Sequoia Surgical Pavilion
evidence: Facility website and CASA press release confirm AAAHC accreditation and AAAHC Certification in Advanced Orthopedics Total Joint Replacement. No evidence of Joint Commission accreditation found; facility only mentions AAAHC. QUAD A status unknown as facility specializes in ortho/spine (not typical QUAD A specialty) and no mentions found.

name: Executive Surgical Center

name: Crow Canyon Surgical Center
evidence: A cardiovascular practice at Crow Canyon Medical Center describes itself as JCAHO-accredited, but no direct confirmation was found in accreditor directories for Crow Canyon Surgical Center specifically at 1320 El Capitan Drive.
